title: AeroOne Internal Data Bundle Envelope
description: Outer envelope is a CMS EnvelopedCms message (RFC 5652) encrypted for the recipient's Email Protection (1.3.6.1.5.5.7.3.4) certificate using AES-256-CBC (OID 2.16.840.1.101.3.4.1.42). The decrypted inner content is a ZIP archive containing exactly: approval.json, two detached SignedCms *.p7s signature files (Document Signing EKU 1.3.6.1.4.1.311.10.3.12) over the raw approval bytes, inventory.json, and approved content rooted only under allowed_roots. Building or importing MUST NOT set a public-data flag and MUST NOT emit to repo/dist/GitHub output paths.
